purpose: Two-certificate Gate A: controlled matched identifiability plus a separately executed online-policy-feasible diagnosis certificate.

paired_phase_design.budget_interpretation: The primary budget uses the protocol-available pre-change history. Larger checkpoints use k matched pre-change references and k post-change diagnostics and are non-controlling diagnostic curves.

public_feature_contract.source: agent-visible numeric observation and reward after every compiled public recipe operation in matched pre-change and post-change phases
public_feature_contract.encoding: post-minus-pre contrasts over sorted flattened finite-masked public values
public_feature_contract.active_action_source: prior expected information over the frozen two-recipe batches
public_feature_contract.fixed_trajectory_action_source: first two actions in the frozen deterministic action library

supersession_reason: The prior controlled-matched certificate could populate gate_a_pass without the separately required online-policy-feasible certificate and its plan/report versions shared an overwrite-prone historical path.

decision_relevance_certificate.pass_rule: median max primary effect must exceed its threshold and either old-policy regret or optimal-action change rate must exceed its threshold
